name: Floor lamp with Shelves - Room Essentials™: Black Metal, Linen Shade, ETL Listed, 62" Height
description:
Light up your living room or dining area with this Floor Lamp with Shelves from Room Essentials™. This floor lamp features a cylindrical shade and a black metal body for a stylish look, and features two-tiered shelves that can be used to display photographs and other decorative accents. The white linen shade brightens up your space with a soft glow, while the one-way light setting with a rotary-socket switch allows for easy operation.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
